description: Bugfix cycle 1 (post-escalation) for Milestone 1 — Foundation & Auth. Fixes 1 defect: test database lifecycle issue in conftest.py.

userStories.title: Fix: Test database dropped between test classes (DEF-001)
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m1-foundation.md. The root conftest.py must override pytest-django's django_db_setup fixture to reuse the Docker-provided ziqreq_test database instead of letting Django create/destroy test_ziqreq_test.
acceptanceCriteria: conftest.py contains a django_db_setup fixture (scope=session) that sets DATABASES.default.TEST.NAME to the existing DB name and runs migrate --run-syncdb
All 14 Python tests pass: 7 dev_bypass + 6 azure_ad + 1 smoke (zero errors)
docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm python-tests pytest exits with code 0
userStories.notes:
Defect: DEF-001. File: conftest.py (project root, 8 lines). Expected: All 14 Python tests pass. Actual: 7 errors in test_dev_bypass.py — OperationalError: database "test_ziqreq_test" does not exist.

Suggested fix: Replace conftest.py contents with:

```python
"""Root pytest config: collect_ignore_glob + django_db_setup override."""

import pytest

collect_ignore_glob = [
    "services/*/apps/*/migrations/*",
    "frontend/*",
    "e2e/*",
    "node_modules/*",
]


@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
def django_db_setup(django_test_environment, django_db_blocker):
    """Use pre-existing Docker DB with migrations, skip create/destroy cycle."""
    from django.conf import settings

    settings.DATABASES["default"]["TEST"] = {"NAME": settings.DATABASES["default"]["NAME"]}
    with django_db_blocker.unblock():
        from django.core.management import call_command

        call_command("migrate", "--run-syncdb", verbosity=0)
```

This tells Django the test database IS the real database (no test_ prefix), runs migrations on it, and does NOT create/destroy it. Django TestCase still wraps each test in a rolled-back transaction for isolation.

Do NOT remove any existing collect_ignore_glob entries. Do NOT add @pytest.mark.django_db to TestCase subclasses (Django TestCase handles DB access natively).
